svg.title: Billing App — file structure and connections
svg.desc: Diagram showing every file in the billing app, what it does, and how files import from each other.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain what server.py does in the billing app in detail')
sendPrompt('What environment variables does the billing app need in its .env file?')
sendPrompt('What does each package in requirement.txt do in the billing app?')
sendPrompt('What exactly does app/__init__.py do — explain create_app and get_env_variable')
g.text: Loads Config, inits DB, registers blueprint

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through worker.py line by line — what is pika, what is a callback, what is basic_consume?')
g.text: On message → parses JSON → saves Order

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Config do in config.py and how does SQLAlchemy use SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Order model — what is db.Model, what are the columns, and what does to_dict() do?')
g.text: table: orders · id · user_id · items · amount

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how Flask Blueprint works in orders.py and what GET /api/orders/ returns')
g.text: GET /api/orders/ → queries DB → returns JSON list

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does pika connect to RabbitMQ and what does channel.start_consuming() do?')
sendPrompt('How does SQLAlchemy talk to PostgreSQL — what is a session, what does db.session.add and commit do?')
g.text: written by worker · read by controller

svg.text: How server.py runs two things at once
